title: Clean HUD Bars
description: Super clean healthbar, food bar, armor bar, and experience bar!
body:
**This pack replaces the vanilla HUD with clean bars**
- Healthbar
- Food Bar
- Armor Bar
- Experience Bar

## Instructions:
1. Download file
2. UNZIP the file
3. Place unzipped folder into your resourcepacks folder
4. Enjoy!
